title: dispatch-prepare claim-owner check + small-serial doctrine + tiny-direct disposition
action: (1) dispatch-prepare.mjs prepareDispatch (:174 readCell path): for --kind cell, refuse when the cell is not status claimed, or its trace.worker differs from a new required --worker param (typed error naming the actual owner/status); --force-ownership override logs an audit decision (mirror msh-4's audited-door pattern). bee.mjs handler passes the flag through. (2) Doctrine (docs, not code): skills/bee-hive/SKILL.md lane-scaling row for small + bee-swarming SKILL.md: small lane = ONE live execution worker at a time processing its 1-3 cells SERIALLY (worker returns, orchestrator dispatches next cell; never 2+ live small-lane workers for one feature); align references/routing-and-contracts.md lane-scaling wording. (3) tiny-direct: log one decision recording it as deliberately NOT built — superseded by the ab-tiny-protocol A/B (docs/decisions/ab-tiny-protocol.md, Arm A already measures inline); add a Disposition line to that doc pointing at the decision. Tests: dispatch-prepare refusal rows (unclaimed cell refused; wrong-worker refused naming owner; matching worker passes; force-ownership audited) in the suite that covers dispatch-prepare today (locate; else add to test_misc.mjs). RED first, then GREEN + full verify.

truths: dispatch prepare --kind cell refuses unclaimed/foreign-claimed cells with a typed error; --force-ownership is an audited door; matching owner unaffected.
Small-lane serial doctrine stated in both skill docs + contracts reference; tiny-direct disposition recorded in ab-tiny-protocol.md + decision log.
Full run_verify.mjs green; mirrors/plugin trees re-rendered (skill text changed).
prohibitions: Do NOT build a tiny-direct execution mode.
Do NOT change the A/B assignment mechanics.

trace.outcome: dispatch prepare now refuses unclaimed/foreign-claimed cells (audited --force-ownership door); small-lane serial doctrine documented; tiny-direct disposition recorded as superseded by the ab-tiny-protocol A/B
trace.verification_evidence:
{"red_failure_evidence": "RED (pre-change): reverted skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/dispatch-prepare.mjs, templates/bee.mjs, and templates/lib/command-registry.mjs to their pre-hardening-7 content via `git stash push --keep-index` on those files, keeping the already-updated scripts/test_dispatch_prepare.mjs (with the new hardening-7 assertions). Ran `node scripts/test_dispatch_prepare.mjs` standalone against that reverted code:

Result: 5 FAILURE(S) (26 passed, 5 failed)

FAIL  kind cell without --worker throws (non-zero exit, no payload)
      Error: expected non-zero exit, got 0
FAIL  hardening-7: kind cell against an unclaimed (open) cell is refused, naming its actual status
      Error: expected the typed claim_ownership refusal, got {"tool":"Agent",...} (a real Agent payload was built for an unclaimed cell, no refusal)
FAIL  hardening-7: kind cell claimed by a DIFFERENT worker is refused, naming the actual owner
      Error: expected the typed claim_ownership refusal, got {"tool":"Agent",...} (a real payload was built despite the worker mismatch)
FAIL  hardening-7: --force-ownership overrides a not_owner refusal and appends an audited ownership_override record
      Error: expected an audited ownership_override record, got {...no ownership_override key present in the dispatch.jsonl record...}
FAIL  hardening-7: --force-ownership on an unclaimed cell also proceeds, audited with bypassed:true, code not_claimed
      TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'code') -- no ownership_override record exists pre-change

Every other row in the suite (26 passed) already passed pre-change (including the two pre-existing kind:'cell' rows once their fixtures were updated to a claimed status + matching worker, which is a fixture-only change, not a behavior change) — proving these 5 failures are exactly the new claim-ownership-guard assertions, not pre-existing bugs the new tests happened to trip over. Restored the implementation afterward via `git stash pop` (confirmed byte-identical to the intended edit).", "green_evidence": "GREEN (post-change), standalone suites:
- node scripts/test_dispatch_prepare.mjs -> ALL PASS (31 passed, 0 failed) — includes the 5 new claim-ownership rows (unclaimed refused naming status; wrong-worker refused naming owner; matching worker passes unaffected, no ownership_override written; --force-ownership overrides a not_owner conflict with an audited ownership_override record; --force-ownership on an unclaimed cell also overrides, audited with code:not_claimed and owner_bypassed:null) plus every pre-existing dispatch-prepare row (native-transport, economics, advisor/reviewer/gather kinds) unchanged.
- node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs -> 221 passed, 0 failed (includes the dispatch.prepare registry-example round trip through the real dispatcher; the group's other 'cells.*' examples were transiently red mid-session from a concurrent worker's (hardening-4b) in-flight cells.mjs/claims.mjs edit and are confirmed green now that hardening-4b capped/committed as 644621e).
- node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_misc.mjs -> 93 passed, 0 failed (the 'cell tier: validation...' row that was transiently red mid-session from hardening-4b's in-flight setTier lock change is confirmed green now that 4b committed; test_misc.mjs's own hunks for setTier/claimCell await fixes belong to hardening-4b, kept verbatim in this commit per the orchestrator's instruction).

FULL FOREGROUND VERIFY (no BEE_AGENT_NAME), node scripts/run_verify.mjs, run twice per the known-WSL2-flake protocol:
- Run 1: FAILED SUITES (1): scripts/test_render_race.mjs — 'DETECTOR DID NOT BITE: both unguarded racers exited 0 and the final dir was intact' — this is the documented known WSL2 flake for this suite (race timing sensitive to WSL2 filesystem/CPU scheduling), every other one of 53 suites passed.
- Run 2 (rerun): PASS run_verify: 53 suite(s), concurrency=5, wall=34910ms — all 53 suites green, including scripts/test_render_race.mjs.
- Run 3 (recorded, output captured to .bee/hardening-7-verify.log and attached via cells verify --output-file): exit 0, PASS run_verify: 53 suite(s), concurrency=5, wall=34998ms — all 53 suites green.

Plugin/mirror hygiene: skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/{dispatch-prepare.mjs,command-registry.mjs} and templates/bee.mjs copied byte-identical into .bee/bin/{lib,.}; node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs re-ran twice (after the SKILL.md/reference edits, and again after hardening-4b's HEAD move) so .claude-plugin/skills and .codex-plugin/skills reflect the current canonical skills/ tree — confirmed via scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs (PASS) and scripts/test_skill_render.mjs (PASS) in the full verify run above."}
